# Vishwashanti Gurukul World School — IB Authorizations

> Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is a fully authorized International Baccalaureate (IB) continuum school. It holds current authorization for four IB programmes — Primary Years Programme (PYP), Middle Years Programme (MYP, Years 1–5), Diploma Programme (DP), and Career-related Programme (CP) — with certificates reissued or authorized as recently as late 2025 under Director General Olli-Pekka Heinonen (Geneva). Holograms and watermarks are present on all source certificates.

## Key Facts

- Diploma Programme (DP): originally issued May 2006; reissued November 2025.
- Primary Years Programme (PYP): originally issued April 2009; reissued November 2025.
- Middle Years Programme (MYP): authorized for Years 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5; originally issued April 2018; reissued November 2025.
- Career-related Programme (CP): authorization date October 2025; the certificate does not list a separate reissue date.
- Governing body: International Baccalaureate (Baccalauréat International / Bachillerato Internacional).
- Director General: Olli-Pekka Heinonen, based in Geneva (Genève/Ginebra).
- Current authorization status: Authorized. Most recent authorization/reissue window: October–November 2025.
- Authentication: hologram and watermark present on all certificates.

## Authorization Timeline

The authorization history begins with the Diploma Programme in May 2006, followed by the Primary Years Programme (2009) and the Middle Years Programme (2018). In late 2025, the school achieved a new authorization for the Career-related Programme (October) and completed a reissue cycle for the DP, PYP, and MYP (November).

## Files

- [knowledge_base.md](knowledge_base.md): Full canonical knowledge base in Markdown.
- [knowledge_base.json](knowledge_base.json): Complete structured knowledge base.
- [knowledge_base.jsonl](knowledge_base.jsonl): RAG-ready chunks, one JSON record per line.
- [schema.jsonld](schema.jsonld): Schema.org JSON-LD (School, Organization, Person, EducationalOccupationalCredential).
- [entities.json](entities.json): Entity and relationship extraction.
- [metadata.json](metadata.json): Field-level metadata with source attribution.
- [citations.json](citations.json): Fact-to-source-certificate citation mapping.
- [faq.json](faq.json): Question–answer pairs derived strictly from source facts.
- [README.md](README.md): Repository guide and validation notes.
